title: The US Park Service is on Notice - Fuck You!!!!!! You DUI me and you go down!!!

enrichment.summary: Kyle, drunk and angry, rants about a DUI he received from US Park Service rangers, claiming he tested sober (below legal limit for cannabis at 70 nanograms). He demands his confiscated marijuana back and threatens to expose names if the situation isn't resolved.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Believes he was wrongfully charged since he tested below the impairment threshold
Opposes it; views arresting someone for a joint as a waste of public money
Angry and threatening accountability if his weed isn't returned
